feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Purchase Order Receipt in different plant then the one ordering goods
entry.content:
Our client would like to create purchase order from a Plant (e.g. Plant A) but good receipt should happen in a different Plant (e.g. Plant B, which is more like a warehouse). Since is not possible to change plant at good receipt level, the best option would be to insert in Purchase Order Plant B directly, this could cause inconsistency in good receipt related to cost object, since cost of the purchasing would be recorded in Plant B and not Plant A.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Opening periods in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Good morning!

Please your help.

I want to register a supplier invoice in january and february months of this current year 2025 but I get the next error:

What can I do?

#SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition

#Supplier Invoice

SAP S/4HANA Finance 

#SAP S/4 HANA Logistic

entry.title: Different Profit Center derivation than the Cost Center master data (Message KI339)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and facing an issue related to the assignment of the profit center (CEBE) in manual journal entries.

When I try to post a journal entry and manually enter a profit center different from the one assigned to the cost center in its master data, the system overwrites my value and displays message KI339: “Profit center was set to &1”.

🔍Context and what I've checked

I came across Solucionado: Message KI339: Profit center was set to XXXXXX - SAP Community, where someone mentioned that SSCUI 103007 can be used to change the behavior of this message.

However, I don’t see this SSCUI available in my Central Business Configuration (CBC).

❓My questions are:

  1. Has SSCUI 103007 been changed or replaced?  Because I have checked the accelerator "SSCUI_List_EN_XX" and this SSCUI is not in this excel, so now it´s not available. I remember I have done message control on this SSCUI in the past at least for the area M8, and this area now is in other SSCUI. Is it possible the area KI is now in a different SSCUI?

  2. If I switch off the message KI339 (set it to “Switch off message”), will the system allow me to retain the manually entered profit center, even if it differs from the cost center’s master data?

  3. I also checked the standard substitution rule /0SAP/SetProfitCenter in the "Manage Substitution and Validation Rules" app, but:

    • I cannot modify the standard rule.

    • When I try to create a new substitution for the same business context (FINS_ACC_MS_1), I don’t see how I could prevent the profit center from being overwritten if it's already manually entered.

🙏I’d really appreciate your help

If anyone has experienced a similar issue or knows of a workaround (via configuration or logic), I'd be very grateful for your insights.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Customisation on S4 HANA Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a custom OData Service developed on S4 HANA Server(on-premise), Can we move custom Odata service to S/4 Hana Public cloud system. ? If not then is there is a way to create custom odata service on Public Cloud?

Regards

PM

entry.title: Deactivate EWM for SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP team,

Our client is thinking of deactivating EWM for their SAP Public cloud system but we are not able to find any guidelines regarding this. Would you be able to help with the action items if we proceed with this deactivation? Will it be easily done through configuration or do we need SAP help? Thank you.

entry.title: Log in as another CB user
entry.content:
Hi Expert !

I would like to confirm how to log in as a CB user.

My CB user is CB9980000043 and I log in with this ID.

I created a user in the App "Manage Workforce".
I would like to log in using the additional user I created. Is there any way to do this?

Soma

entry.title: Unable to debug Adobe Javascript code in Adobe LiveCycle Designer
entry.content:
Hi All

 

We are facing an issue with Adobe LiveCycle Designer( Remote desktop). It appears that the software does not provide a built-in JavaScript debugger, which makes it challenging to debug code efficiently. We have done the debugger settings in  Acrobat Reader, however we don’t have Acrobat Professional in our system( Remote desktop).

Could you please let  us know if we have to install  Acrobat Professional  to resolve this issue or any other suggestions is really appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajeswari

entry.title: sap transports tracking in 2sl system
entry.content:
Hello team,

 

I would like to know is there any possibility to tracking of transports in 2sl system for public cloud as it is causing so many disruptions between people who is having access for it .

 

kindly let us know the possibilities to track changes  before transporting it

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Maintain multiple delivery address in Purchase Order
entry.content:
In S/4HANA ME21N Create Purchase Order, field Address No. under tab Delivery Address. User will select multiple address using this field to change address.

However, we cannot found where to maintain the address no. in Public Cloud "Create Purchase Order Advanced App". We checked the case below, it mentioned using BADI to maintain the multiple address.
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/maintain-delivery-address/qaq-p/12670173

 

Could you please confirm if any app can maintain the address no. or need to use BADI to maintain it? Thank you!

entry.title: Is it feasible to configure business role with restriction by Purchasing Group and PR type?
entry.content:
Hi folks,

There is requirement to restrict a user who can only create purchase requisition with requirement below.
We tried to work with "maintain restriction" feature in "maintain business role" but could not make it.
Is it feasible to do so by standard function in S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition?

The requirement:

Restriction 1

PR Type:     Z1, Z2, Z3, Z4, Z5

Purchasing Group:  ZG1, ZG2, ZG3, ZG4

Restriction 2

PR Type:    Z1, Z2, Z4

Purchasing Group:  ZG8

Please give some advice. Thanks!

entry.title: How to fetch Valuation details from material master on to Purchase order
entry.content:
In PO you will see  below message when Valuation Type is empty.
'In case of split valuation, please enter a valuation type' , but its does not allow to save the item.


 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Authorization setting for separate right of Post Goods Receipt App
entry.content:
We are testing on Public Cloud Authorization setting using Maintain Business Role App

Role designed to contained rights below:

-> create/change/display purchase requisition in Create Purchase Requisition App

-> create/change/display purchase order in Create Purchase Order App

-> only display material document in Post Goods Receipt App

-> only display material document/ service entry sheet in Manage Service Entry Sheet App

 

However, we found that for Post Goods Receipt App and Manage Service Entry Sheet App, cannot control to only display. We only can find IAM Apps below:
-> Post Goods Receipt (Transaction Code: MIGO_GR)

-> Manage Service Entry Sheet / Display Service Entry Sheets (Transaction Code: F2027)

 

is there any other business catelogs and IAM App required to maintain? As the Access Categories will control entire role Write and Read.

 

Because like Purchase Order, it contained two apps to perform create/change/display.

-> Create/edit: Create Purchase Order App

-> Display: Display Purchase Order App

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Business context of Production Order while creating the custom field in public cloud
entry.content:
Can you suggest a business context to create a custom field in the production order CO02 in public cloud.

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Missing configuration items in Manage your solution
entry.content:
In the customizing app "Manage your solution" in the Test system, some configuration steps under the configuration item Electronic Communication - Statutory Reporting - Finance are missing. I can see them in the Productive system, however.

Configuration steps missing:

  1. Define Parameters for Electronic Communication with Authorities - 102367
  2. Make Settings for Electronic Communication with Authorities - 103726

entry.title: Scope Item 5W2 and Intercompany Scope Items like 1WO
entry.content:
Ladies and Gentlemen,

We would like to understand what conflicts exist between 5W2 and the intercompany scope items.

Let's assume we scope 5W2 and want to activate 1WO afterwards. Would this be technically possible?

Can anyone provide more background information on this topic?

Many thanks
Sebastian

entry.title: Maintenance Order - System Status released CDS
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

please, does anyone know the name of the CDS where I can find this information of a Maintenance Order?

I am looking for a released CDS view (S4H Cloud Public Edition), therefore I cannot use just a random CDS or a BAPI or a table name. It will be used in a RAP Application.

Thank you in advance,

Matus

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: how to default cost center to a FS item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to default Cost center to a FS item in group reporting 

Regards,

Inthiyaz Shaik

entry.title: Bill of exchange payment request print out in France (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello,

in France (and as far as I know also in Spain and Italy) specific type of bill of exchange is used to collect incoming payments (LCR/Lettre de change classique). It's a special bills of exchange receivable that requires printing BoE paper by us (seller), instead of customer. This bill is then sent to the customer and must be returned signed by him.

For that purpose new payment method with special G/L BoE indicator = 'R' was created in SSCUI = 101972

Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region for Payment Transactions). This method works fine and after successful payment run a noted item with special G/L =R is created.
Unfortunately, I don't see anywhere in the system or in the S4HC documentation any option to generate a BoE request printout. The ‘Bill of Exchange’ step in ‘Output parameter determination’ refers to the BoE presentation, rather than sending the document to the customer for acceptance.

Is there any predefined template for printing BoE request? Is there an option in Public Cloud to print such a document? What application object should be used for assigning print out template?

 

Thank you very much in advance for any support in this matter.

entry.title: MD61(Create PIRs) Planning period Items
entry.content:
Hello Members,

Please tell me about Planning Period Items.

Items "D" and "T" look the same.

Is there any difference in behavior between these two?
How should I use them?

 

I would be grateful if you could help me.
Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Industrial Manufacturing

entry.title: inspection plan is not getting deleted using app Delete Task Lists without Archiving ( CA98 )
entry.content:
Inspection plan have been uploaded wrong for materials which needs to be deleted in mass. For that app Delete Task Lists without Archiving ( CA98 ) option is available which while selecting that material is giving message : 
'No task lists corresponding to selection criteria exist '

 

Why is the error raised?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
